form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Hughes Two Me at Mt Harding over 2400m in a 3yo+ on March 22 at $28.10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third behind Blastfromthepast at Phar Lap Racecourse over 2100m in a 4yo+ on April 1 at $7.10. Has the inside draw and is expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Captain Crunch out of Hopeful Harriet having her first start. Showed ability when she won at Addington in a trial on March 31 over 2600m. Recent trial winner who is expected to measure up.
